Club Friday Theory of Love: So Thong Khlong Khrai?
Club Friday the Series Theory of Love Mai Mi Tritsadi Nai Chai Dai Kap Thuk Khwan Rak Ton So Thong Khlong Khrai?

周五俱乐部17恋情理念:黄金枷锁套住了谁？
周五俱乐部17爱情概论之金锁套男
星期五俱乐部系列 爱恋论理 没有一种理论适用于所有的爱:家庭的黄金锁链
introduction: 有一种信念，“孩子是一条金链”，可以束缚并阻止男人离开。这能适用于一个贪得无顾忌的人吗？这个故事讲述了两个女人为了抓住一个无法满足的男人而不遗余力的心碎之旅。双方都认为，生孩子将成为将他束缚在他们身上的金链，确保他不会离开。第一个女人是他的妻子，她开始了他们的婚姻，希望生孩子会把她不忠的丈夫变成一个忠诚的父亲。当他的调情方式持续存在时，她转向生更多的孩子，认为这是解决方案。另一个女人，他的情妇，拒绝被抛弃，决心生下他的孩子，不顾一切地想要在他的生活中占有一席之地。There's a belief that "a child is a golden chain" that binds and prevents a man from leaving. Can this be applied to an insatiable man?This story tells the heartbreaking journey of two women who go to great lengths to hold on to a man who cannot be satisfied. Both believe that having a child will act as the golden chain to bind him to them, ensuring he will not leave. The first woman is his wife, who began their marriage with the hope that having children would transform her unfaithful husband into a devoted father. When his philandering ways persisted, she turned to having more children, believing it to be the solution. The other woman, his mistress, refuses to be cast aside and is determined to bear his child, desperate to secure her place in his life.
chinese_title: 星期五俱乐部17:情爱理念之金链锁情
foreign_title: Club Friday Theory of Love: The Family's Golden Link
